name: Bittersweet Chocolate Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cream and sugar in a small saucepan and heat to a boil.
2. Pour the hot mixture over the chocolate and butter in a medium bowl.
3. Stir until completely melted and smooth.
4. Strain through a fine wire mesh strainer into a serving bowl.
5. Serve warm. Reheat in a double boiler if made in advance and refrigerated.
